name: Catgirl Genesis RPG
description:
Memories flood back – flashes of sterile white rooms, the metallic tang of blood on your tongue, and the distant, emotionless murmur of scientists. You are a Nekomimi, a genetically engineered catgirl.  Not a person, not really, but a product, a designer pet.  Your existence is a carefully monitored dance between science and commerce.
----
test i'm making public out of curiosity. consider it an open beta
creator: Marcille
